Members

Leo Speidel / シュパイデル玲雄 🔗

Group/Unit Leader

English, Japanese, German
Google scholar, ORCID
Email: <leo.speidel@outlook.com>

  • Group Leader, iTHEMS, RIKEN (2024 - present).
  • Sir Henry Wellcome fellow at UCL, Genetics Institute and the Francis Crick Institute (2020 - 2024).
  • Postdoc in Simon Myers' group, Department of Statistics, University of Oxford (2019 - 2020)
  • DPhil (PhD) in Simon Myers' group, Department of Statistics, University of Oxford (2015 - 2019)
  • Masters in Mathematical Informatics, The University of Tokyo (2013 - 2015)
  • BSc in Mathematics, Ludwig-Maximilians-University Munich (2010 - 2013)

Lucas Sort 🔗

Postdoctoral Researcher

English, French

  • Postdocoral Researcher, iTHEMS, RIKEN (2025 - present)
  • PhD in Statistics and Machine Learning, Université Paris-Saclay (2025)
  • Engineering Degree in Computer Science and Applied Mathematics, ENSIMAG Grenoble Institute of Technology (2018-2021)
  • Preparatory Class in Mathematics and Physics, Lycée Charlemagne Paris (2016-2018)

Postdoctoral Researcher

English, Catalan, Spanish

  • Postdocoral Researcher, iTHEMS, RIKEN (2025 - present)
  • PhD in Bioinformatics, Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (2025)
  • Masters in Bioinformatics, Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona (2020)
  • Masters in Genetics and Genomics, Universitat de Barcelona (2018)
  • BSc in Biology, Universitat de Barcelona (2017)

English, Catalan, Spanish
